word: G5369 - φιλήδονος - philḗdonos - fil-ay'-don-os - Lover of pleasure

sections.paragraph:
- Original: φιλήδονος

- Transliteration: Philedonos

- Phonetic: fil-ay'-don-os

- Definition:

1. loving pleasure

- Origin: from G5384 and G2237

- TDNT entry: 17:09,3

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G5384 and G2237; fond of pleasure that is voluptuous: - lover of pleasure.
